content: I've generated a de-identified summary of diabetic patients over 65 years old. In our database, we have 42 patients matching these criteria. The average HbA1c value is 7.2%, with a range from 5.8% to 11.3%. 28 patients (67%) have HbA1c values over the recommended threshold of 7.0%. Note that this information is presented in aggregate form without any personally identifiable information. For patient-specific information, please use the secure clinical portal which requires appropriate authentication and authorization.
